channel.title: Policy & Security Think Tank Updates
channel.description: Custom RSS feed from CSIS, CFR, and other policy institutions

item.title: Section 702: Why Do We Need It?
item.description: FISA Section 702 is up for renewal again. Congress renewed it in 2012, 2018, and 2024 with bipartisan support. Now, President Trump supports a clean reauthorization of the program. In other words, the government wants to extend it as it is, and it's the right policy.

item.title: How to Interpret Wartime Oil Prices
item.description: Most oil market observers look to frequently quoted futures markets to represent the price of oil. But in the current supply disruption caused by the Iran war, the less publicized physical oil market is the best barometer of scarcity.
